xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Translations
xwikidoc.content:
##Admin section AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_excludedLines=Lignes exclues AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_excludedLines.hint=Lignes contenant des informations sensibles dans les fichiers xwiki.cfg et xwiki.properties AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_serverLocation=Emplacement du serveur AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_serverLocation.hint=Chemin de l'emplacement du serveur AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_spamSize=Taille du spam AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_spamSize.hint=Nombre minimal de lignes considérées comme spam AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_xwikiInstallLocation=Emplacement du dossier XWiki AdminTools.Code.ConfigurationClass_xwikiInstallLocation.hint=Chemin vers l'emplacement du dossier XWiki admin.admintools.description=Configurer l'application Admin Tools adminTools.extension.name=Application Admin Tools (Pro) adminTools.extension.title=Admin Tools
## Dashboard sections adminTools.dashboard.toc.title=Table du contenu adminTools.dashboard.serverNotFound.error=Le chemin du serveur n''a pas été trouvé ou n''est actuellement pas supporté par cette version d''Admin Tools Pro. Merci d''ajouter manuellement le chemin vers le serveur sur la page de configuration d''Admin Tools. Serveur actuellement supporté : {0} adminTools.dashboard.missingRights=Accès refusé pour absence de droits administrateur !
## Config adminTools.dashboard.backend.description=Obtenez des infos sur votre back-end. adminTools.dashboard.backend.java=Version de java détectée : {0} adminTools.dashboard.backend.os.architecture=Architecture du système d''exploitation : {0} adminTools.dashboard.backend.os.legend=Infos du système d'exploitation adminTools.dashboard.backend.os.name=Nom du système d''exploitation : {0} adminTools.dashboard.backend.os.version=Version du système d''exploitation : {0} adminTools.dashboard.backend.supportedDB.error=Base de données non trouvée. Bases de données supportées actuellement : {0} adminTools.dashboard.backend.title=Back-end adminTools.dashboard.backend.usedDB=Base de données utilisée : {0}, version {1} adminTools.dashboard.backend.usedServer=Serveur utilisé : {0}, version {1} adminTools.dashboard.backend.xwiki.version=Version de XWiki installée : {0}
## Files adminTools.dashboard.download.description=Obtenez les fichiers dont vous avez besoin. Consultez-les directement dans le navigateur ou téléchargez-les en tant qu'archive. adminTools.dashboard.download.label=Exportez les fichiers nécessaires pour obtenir du support adminTools.dashboard.download.title=Fichiers adminTools.dashboard.download.view.configuration=Fichier de configuration de XWiki adminTools.dashboard.download.view.description=Voir le contenu du fichier adminTools.dashboard.download.view.properties=Fichier des propriétés de XWiki adminTools.dashboard.download.warning=Avant de télécharger et envoyer les fichiers, merci de vous assurer que vous avez configuré les lignes qui sont susceptibles de contenir des données sensibles dans la page de configuration d'Admin Tools !
## Health check adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.database.info=État de la base de données valide. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.database.warn=Base de données non trouvée ! adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.database.notSupported=La base de connées en cours d''utilisation est {0}, et n''est pas supportée par XWiki. Consultez les liens vers l''aide pour trouver les pré-requis de compatibilité de la base de données. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.description=Vérifiez que votre instance est configurée correctement et s''exécute correctement. Pour tout problème, consultez {0}. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.flushCache=Vider le cache de l'instance adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.flushCache.error=Il s'est produit une erreur pendant le nettoyage du cache de l'instance. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.flushCache.success=Cache vidé avec succès. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.java.info=Statut de java valide. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.java.warn=La version de Java n'a pas pu être déterminée. Merci de vous assurer que vous l'avez correctement installé et configuré les chemins de votre installation de Java. Pour plus d'information, consultez les liens d'aide. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.java.error=Vous utilisez actuellement la version {0} de Java, qui n''est pas compatible avec cette installation de XWiki. Merci de consulter les liens d''aide pour connaitre la compatibilité. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.allocation.info=L''allocation mémoire maximale est égale à la taille initiale. La valeur configurée est de {0} Go. adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.allocation.warn=Pour améliorer les performances, les allocations mémoire -Xms et -Xmx doivent être identiques. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.cache.info=Document cache status OK. Current cache value is {0}. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.cache.null=Document store cache capacity was not configured and is set by default to 500. See cache recommendations in help links above. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.cache.low=Document cache capacity is set below 500 [{0}]. See cache recommendations in the help links page. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.free.error=Your JVM instance has less than 512MB of free memory left, currently at {0}MB. Allocate more resources to you JVM! Check the help links for further help. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.free.warn=Your instance memory is running low. Currently you have {0}MB of memory left. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.info=Memory status OK. Currently there are {0}GB of free memory. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.memory.maxcapacity.error=JVM memory is less than 1024MB, currently at {0}MB. Allocate more resources to you JVM! Check the help links for further help. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.os.info=OS info retrieval OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.os.warn=There has been an error while gathering OS info! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.cpu.warn=The CPU does not satisfy the minimum system requirements of 2 Cores, 2800MHz frequency and 2048KB cache size. Found CPU specifications: {0} cores and a frequency of {1}MHz ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.cpu.info=CPU performance OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.info=System performance OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.memory.warn=To safely run the XWiki installation, it is recommended to have at least 2GB of RAM. Currently having: {0}GB. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.memory.info=System memory capacity OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.space.warn=To safely run XWiki, there should be at least 16GB of free system space. Currently having: {0}GB of free space on partition: {1} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.performance.space.info=The system has enough free space for the XWiki installation. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.info=System encoding OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.file.warn=System file encoding should be set to UTF-8! Currently using {0}. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.file.info=System file encoding is set to UTF-8. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.file.notFound=File encoding could not be detected! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.lang.warn=System language encoding should be set to UTF-8! Currently using {0}. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.lang.info=System language encoding is set to UTF-8. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.lang.notFound=Language encoding could not be determined. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.system.recommendation=System encoding should be set to UTF-8! Please consult the help links page to get further instructions of how to configure the system encoding. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.info=XWiki encoding OK. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.active.warn=XWiki active encoding should be set to UTF-8! Currently using {0}. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.active.info=XWiki active encoding is set to UTF-8. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.active.notFound=Active encoding could not be detected! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.config.warn=XWiki configuration encoding should be set to UTF-8! Currently using {0}. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.config.info=XWiki configuration encoding is set to UTF-8. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.security.xwiki.config.notFound=Configuration encoding could not be detected! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.title=Health check ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.time=Time since the last health check: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.start=Start health check ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.currentValue=Current value: ### Missing: adminTools.job.notFound=Health check job status not found ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.message.success=No issue found! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.message.warning=Some issues have been found, for more details please see the results below. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.message.error=Critical issues were found, please consult the results below! ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.execution.error=An error occurred while running the health check. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.operations=Instance operations ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.linkLabel=help links
##Instance usage ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.description=See the stats related to the usage of the instance. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.title=Instance usage ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.total.extensions=There are {0} extensions installed. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.total.users=There are a total of {0} users registered in this XWiki instance. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.wiki.attachments=Number of attachments: {0} ({1}) ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.wiki.documents=Number of documents: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.wiki.name=Size info for wiki {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.wiki.users=Number of users: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.wiki.viewAll=View usage info for all wikis ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific=Specific stats ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.comments=View pages with over {0} comments ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.comments.hint=View a list with all the pages that have above {0} comments ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.recycleBins=Check pages and attachments recycle bins ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.recycleBins.hint=View the size of the recycle bins for all wikis in instance ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.emptyPages=View empty pages ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.specific.emptyPages.hint=View the empty pages from all wikis
## Security ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.activeEncoding=Active encoding ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.configurationEncoding=Configuration encoding ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.description=See an overview of your security information. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.error=Error while gathering security information. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.fileEncoding=File encoding ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.LANG=Used language ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.PWD=Working directory ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.title=Security ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.title=Detailed security view ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.groupsRights=View given groups rights ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.usersRights=View given users rights ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.pageRights=View user rights on page ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.documentUser=Change user fields from document ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.detailed.securityCache=Check security cache ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.wikiName=Wiki name ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.type=Type of rights ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.space=Space ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.docName=Document name ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.users=User ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.groups=Group ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.level=Security levels ### Missing: adminTools.security.livedata.policy=Security policy ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.wiki.title=Wiki ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.wiki.description=Select the wiki from which to retrieve the users. If the field is empty, the current wiki will be used. ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.wiki.placeholder=Select wiki ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.page.title=Page ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.page.description=Choose a document from the selected wiki above. If no document is selected, the rules for the current page are shown. ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.page.placeholder=Select a document ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.user.title=User ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.user.description=Choose a user from the selected wiki above. ### Missing: adminTools.security.common.user.placeholder=Select a user ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.description=View the rights a user has on a given document. ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.button.check=Check ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.results=Results ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.user=User ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.document=Document ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.view=View ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.edit=Edit ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.comment=Comment ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.delete=Delete ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.admin=Admin ### Missing: adminTools.security.pageRights.table.header.programming=Programming ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.description=Replace all occurences of the old user with the new user for the selected fields of existing documents inside the current wiki. Based on the affected fields, this will also grant the affected documents the rights of the new user, instead of those of the old user. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.contentAuthor=Gives affected document Programming or Script rights, if the new user has them, allowing existing scripts or protected API calls inside that document to be executed when the document is viewed. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.author=Gives affected document Admin or Programming rights, if the new user has them, allowing special objects (wiki macros, wiki components, UIX, translations) to be registered at a wiki or global level. Also updates the value displayed on the documents [Last modified by] section with the new user. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.creator=Gives delete right for the document to the new user. Also updates the value displayed on the documents [Created by] section with the new user. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.requirements=This page requires Programming Rights to function. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.wiki.title=Wiki ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.wiki.description=Select the wiki from which to retrieve the users. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.wiki.placeholder=Select wiki ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.oldUser.title=Old user to replace ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.oldUser.description=Choose the user that you want to replace. You can only select local users from the above selected wiki. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.oldUser.placeholder=Select the user to be replaced ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.newUser.title=New user to replace with ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.newUser.description=Choose the new user from either local and global users from the above selected wiki. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.newUser.placeholder=Select the new user ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.fields.title=Fields to replace ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.button.preview=Preview ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.button.preview.hint=The next step displays the list of documents that will be modified and will ask for confirmation. ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.button.confirm=Confirm ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.button.cancel=Cancel ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.button.back=Back to main screen ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.preview.summary=Documents to update ({0} total) from __URLSTART__{1}__URLEND__ to __URLSTART__{2}__URLEND2__ for fields {3}: ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.preview.summary.entry=__URLSTART__{0}__URLEND__ ({1}) fields {2} ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.apply.summary=Update fields {0} from user __URLSTART__{1}__URLEND__ to __URLSTART__{2}__URLEND2__: ### Missing: adminTools.security.changeDocumentUser.apply.status=Done ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.description=View both cached and live security rules for the specified document, its spaces, and the current wiki. Additionally, check the cached access rights for the user on the specified document, including its space and wiki levels. ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.title=Cached Access Entries ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.table.ref=References ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.table.access=Access ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.table.allowed=Allowed rights: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.table.denied=Denied rights: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.access.table.document=Document {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.title=Rules Entries ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.entity=References ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.cachedRule=Cached Rule ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.liveRule=Live Rule ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.rule=Rule ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.state=State: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.rights=Rights: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.users=Users: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.table.groups=Groups: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.security.securityCache.rules.empty=No rules for this entity.
## Cloud ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.title=Cloud instance info ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.description=See stats related to your cloud instance. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.numberOfUsersInNetworkGroup=Users in Network Group: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.numberOfWikis=Number of wikis: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.numberOfUsers=Number of users: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.numberOfUsersInPayingGroup=Users in Paying Group: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.storage=Storage (Mb): {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.supportLevel=Support level: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.limits.timeLeft=Subscription expires in: {0} ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.subsection.title=Additional actions ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.subsection.access=Get access ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.subsection.orders=View account orders ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.cloud.subsection.issues=View instance issues ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.orders.header.title=Order ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.orders.header.date=Date ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.orders.header.amount=Amount ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.orders.header.status=Status ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.issues.header.key=Issue ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.issues.header.summary=Summary ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.issues.header.priority=Priority ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.issues.header.status=Status ### Missing: adminTools.cloud.livedata.issues.header.updated=Last updated
## Upload job ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.result.hint=Job results ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.start.fail=Failed to start job for file [{0}] at time [{1}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.start.waiting=Waiting for a similar job to finish... ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.message.success=Upload was successful! ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.message.error=There was an error during the upload. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.backup.success=Backup file [{0}] created for file [{1}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.backup.fail=Could not create backup file [{0}] for file [{1}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.assessoriginal.fail=Unable to correctly assess the original file for [{0}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.save.success=Successfully uploaded file [{0}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.save.fail=Failed to upload [{0}]. Reason: failed to rename original file [{1}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.backup.fail=Manual action required: failed to automatically remove backup file [{0}]. Root cause: [{1}] ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.target.fail=Manual action required: failed to automatically remove new file [{0}]. Root cause: [{1}] ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.copy.fail=Manual action required: failed to automatically restore backup file [{0}] for new file [{1}]. Root cause: [{2}] ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.file.success=Successfully restored backup and removed new file [{0}]. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.success=Backup restored with success. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.start=Attempting to restore backup... ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.batch.restore.fail=There were issues while trying to restore the backup. Please consult the log. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.fail=There was an error while processing the archive: [{0}] ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.success=Upload finished with success. ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.none=NO JOB FOUND ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.waiting=WAITING ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.running=RUNNING ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.error=ERROR ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.warn=WARNING ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.success=DONE ### Missing: adminTools.jobs.upload.state.noinfo=NO INFO
##Packages ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.notavailable=Upload functionality is not available on cloud instances. ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.livetable.doc.title=Package name ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.livetable.job_status=Upload status ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.livetable.doc.author=Initiator ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.livetable.doc.date=Upload date ### Missing: adminTools.packages.upload.livedata.title=Choose or load a package to upload ### Missing: adminTools.packages.started.livedata.title=Uploaded packages ### Missing: adminTools.packages.dashboard.uploadpackages=Upload a package ### Missing: adminTools.packages.return=Return to the upload overview ### Missing: adminTools.packages.livetable._actions.upload=Unzip and upload the selected package

## Modals ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.button=Download ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.date.from=From ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.date.to=To ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.logs.filter.placeholder.from=Logs from date... ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.logs.filter.placeholder.to=Logs to date... ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.logs.title=Logs ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.provided=Configuration info ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.title=Get support files ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.xwikiConfig.title=xwiki.cfg ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.download.modal.xwikiProperties.title=xwiki.properties ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.emptyPage.modal.title=Pages with no content ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.emptyPage.modal.header.actions=Actions ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.emptyPage.modal.header.docName=Page ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.emptyPage.modal.header.wikiName=Wiki name ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.emptyPage.modal.action.delete=Delete ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.logs.modal.nLines.hint=The maximum number of lines is 50000, since the complete logs can also be downloaded. If no value is defined, 1000 will be used as a default value. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.logs.modal.nLines.label=Number of extracted lines ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.logs.modal.submit=View ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.logs.modal.title=Show last n lines of log ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.showLogs=View last n lines of log... ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.spamPage.modal.title=Pages with more than {0} comments ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.spamPage.modal.notFound=There are no pages with more than {0} comments. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.spamPage.modal.header.commentsCount=Comments count ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.spamPage.modal.header.docName=Page ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.spamPage.modal.header.wikiName=Wiki name ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.content=Are you sure you want to flush the instance cache? ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.button=Confirm ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.title=Recycle bins size for all wikis ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.error=There has been an error while gathering recycle bins size info for all wikis. ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.header.wikiName=Wiki name ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.header.documentsCount=Deleted pages ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.header.attachmentsCount=Deleted attachments ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.header.totalCount=Total ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.documents=View deleted pages ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.healthcheck.modal.wikiBins.attachments=View deleted attachments ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.attachmentsCount=Attachments count ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.attachmentsSize=Total attachments size ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.documentsCount=Documents count ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.wikiName=Wiki name ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.title=Wikis size ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.instanceUsage.modal.wikiSize.userCount=User count ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.modal.groupsRights.title=Groups rights ### Missing: adminTools.dashboard.security.modal.usersRights.title=Users rights
